identity.name: WaxLog
identity.description: The Social Network for Vinyl Collectors
identity.tone: Soft, Nostalgic, tactile, premium but accessible

usage_rules.headings: Use DM Serif Display for all H1-H3. Italicize key emotional words for emphasis. Letter-spacing: normal.
usage_rules.body: Use Inter for all UI text, labels, and paragraphs. Use 'tracking-wide' for uppercase labels to add elegance.

textures.usage: Overlay noise texture with opacity 0.4 on the main background to give a paper/analog feel.

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 h-10 px-8 py-2

variants.default: bg-[#1F1F1F] text-white hover:bg-[#1F1F1F]/90 hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-200
variants.secondary: bg-[#F6D6DE] text-[#1F1F1F] hover:bg-[#D98FA1] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200

Card.base: rounded-2xl border border-[#E6C98B]/30 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
Card.vinyl_card: aspect-square relative group overflow-hidden rounded-lg shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 bg-black

Input.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-[#E6C98B]/50 bg-white/80 px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#D98FA1] focus-visible:border-transparent disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

motion.spin: animate-spin-slow (define as 3s linear infinite for 'playing' state)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Fonts: Add the Google Fonts import to /app/frontend/src/index.css immediately.
2. Configure Tailwind: Update /app/frontend/tailwind.config.js with the colors and borderRadius defined above. Extend the theme, don't just overwrite.
3. Global CSS: Add a body rule in index.css to set bg-[#FAF7F2] and text-[#1F1F1F]. Add the noise texture as a pseudo-element on the body if possible.
4. Component Customization: When using Shadcn, override the default 'radius' variable to 0.75rem or 1rem.
5. Layouts: For the 'Feed', use a single column layout with max-width-xl. For 'Collection', use a responsive grid (2 cols mobile, 4-5 cols desktop).
6. Animations: Create a 'spin-slow' utility in tailwind config: animation: { 'spin-slow': 'spin 8s linear infinite' }.
7. Data Test IDs: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
